display.purpose: Vault names and the largest page-level identity moments.

headline.purpose: Major panel titles and section-level analysis headings.

body.purpose: Default UI text, descriptions, row values, and control labels.

label.purpose: Uppercase metadata labels, table micro-headings, and compact sort/filter captions.

mono.purpose: Addresses, hash-like values, and tabular technical readouts.

shadows.name: overlay-shadow
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, popovers, search results, and temporary floating UI only.

shadows.name: low-shadow
shadows.purpose: Legacy card primitive support. Avoid adding it to new analytical panels.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default feedback for hover, selected, expanded, and focus-visible states.

motion.name: loading-progress
motion.purpose: Progress bar movement in loading states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact rectangular action for vault links and primary task movement.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 0; background: #0657f9; color: #ffffff; font-family: Aeonik, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(6, 87, 249, 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0657f9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary or external action with the accent preserved as an affordance.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #0657f9; border-radius: 0; background: #ffffff; color: #0657f9; font-family: Aeonik, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(6, 87, 249, 0.05); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0657f9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Plain search field for filtering vaults without drawing attention away from the table.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 300px; max-width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 4px; background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: Aeonik, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #808080; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0657f9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Selected Filter Chip
components.description: Compact selected filter state with pale blue fill and explicit border.
components.css: .ds-filter-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 32px; padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid #0657f9; border-radius: 0; background: rgba(6, 87, 249, 0.08); color: #0657f9; font-family: Aeonik, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-filter-chip:hover { background: rgba(6, 87, 249, 0.12); } .ds-filter-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0657f9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Vault Row
components.description: The core ledger row: dense, bordered, white, and quietly interactive.
components.css: .ds-vault-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr repeat(5, 1fr); align-items: center; min-height: 50px; padding: 8px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: Aeonik, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-vault-row:hover { background: #f5f5f5; } .ds-vault-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0657f9; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-vault-row span, .ds-vault-row strong { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-vault-row strong { text-align: right; font-weight: 600; } .ds-vault-name { font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Analytical Panel
components.description: Flat bordered container for charts, vault facts, strategy allocation, or event streams.
components.html:
Historical Performance

Vault Performance

Compare APY trends over the selected timeframe.
components.css: .ds-panel { width: 360px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 4px; background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: Aeonik, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-label { margin-bottom: 8px; color: #808080; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-panel-copy { margin: 0; color: #4f4f4f; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview:
Yearn Powerglove should feel like a precise ledger for people who already know what they are looking at: calm enough for repeated analysis, sharp enough to reward scrutiny, and editorial enough that hierarchy feels intentionally composed. The system is dense, but density is edited through spacing, rules, restrained color, and compact typographic contrast.

The visual language rejects boring SaaS dashboard tropes, generic overstuffed AI dashboard patterns, and gamified slop. It should never look like an interchangeable card grid, a neon crypto toy, or a pile of AI-generated panels. The interface earns trust by making numbers, filters, tables, chart states, and vault events feel legible and sober.
keyCharacteristics: Flat white analytical surfaces on a pale gray canvas.
Yearn blue used sparingly for action, selection, sorting, loading, and active state.
Dense tables, compact labels, and tabular numbers with clear row rhythm.
Borders and rules create structure; shadows are reserved for overlays.
Motion is quiet, limited to state feedback and loading progress.

rules.name: The Blue Earns Its Place Rule
rules.body: Use Ledger Blue only for interaction, selection, sorting, loading, and navigational affordance. Do not use it as generic decoration.

rules.name: The White Surface Rule
rules.body: Analytical content lives on white. The surrounding canvas may be pale gray, but panels and rows should stay quiet and readable.

rules.name: The Expert Reader Rule
rules.body: Do not inflate type to explain importance. Use compact scale, weight, alignment, and position so expert users can scan without being shouted at.

rules.name: The Flat Ledger Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If a shadow appears on a persistent panel, the panel is probably trying too hard.

dos: Do keep Yearn Blue rare and functional: active tab, selected filter, primary action, sort state, loading progress, or link.
Do use borders, rules, row height, and alignment to create hierarchy before adding containers.
Do keep tables and event streams dense, but edited through predictable rhythm and compact labels.
Do make focus states visible for keyboard users and avoid chart encodings that rely on color alone.
Do use short, exact copy for errors, empty states, filters, and labels.
donts: Don't create boring SaaS dashboard tropes: interchangeable metric cards, decorative gradients, soft corporate sameness, or visual hierarchy assembled from defaults.
Don't create generic overstuffed AI dashboard patterns: crowded assistant panels, vague summary widgets, excessive badges, or impressive-looking blocks that do not help analysis.
Don't create gamified slop: reward language, casino energy, toy-like visuals, neon crypto terminal clichés, or playful interactions that trivialize serious analysis.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, glassmorphism, hero-metric templates, or identical card grids.
Don't use modals as the first solution for ordinary filtering, sorting, or drill-down. Prefer inline controls and progressive disclosure.
